overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a winding dirt trail through open grassland with scattered pine trees and snow-capped mountains in the distance. Two NPC riders on horses briefly cross the path from right to left in the latter portion of the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail with mountain vista

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail through the grassy meadow, heading toward the distant mountains

entered.detail: winding dirt path cutting through the grassland
tall evergreen pine trees scattered across the landscape
distant mountain range with snow visible on the peaks
open field with tall green grass and wildflowers
small dark wooden structure partially obscured by trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through an open grassland with scattered pine trees. A small wooden cabin is visible on the right initially but passes out of view as the character continues forward. Snow-capped mountains dominate the distant horizon under a partly cloudy morning sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassland trail with horse riders crossing

events.description: two riders on horses emerge from the right and gallop across the path ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the trail as two horse riders pass by from right to left

notable_agents.action: rider on brown horse galloping across the path from right to left
rider on white horse following closely behind the first rider

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, two NPC riders on horses suddenly appear from the right and gallop across the path ahead, moving from right to left. After they pass, the character continues along the dirt trail through the open grassland with pine trees lining the route.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding dirt trail through an open grassland that transitions from a quiet morning trek to a brief encounter with other travelers. It begins with the character walking past a small wooden cabin on the right, moving deeper into a landscape of scattered pine trees under a partly cloudy sky. As the journey continues, the view remains fixed on the snow-capped mountains dominating the distant horizon before the stillness is interrupted by two riders on horses. These NPCs suddenly gallop across the path from right to left, momentarily crossing the character's trajectory. The scene then settles back into a steady pace as the camera follows the character further along the trail, flanked by the enduring greenery of the pine-lined grassland.
